items.example: The art thief stole a valuable painting from the mansion.
The burglar broke into the house through a window.
The con artist tricked people into giving him money.
The security guard was sleeping when the burglar entered.
The customs officer checked all the luggage.
The guard carried a loaded weapon.
The burglar alarm went off and woke everyone up.
The artwork was worth millions of dollars.
The theft of the Mona Lisa shocked the world.
